message.content: This section provides a quantitative analysis of mobile game advertising trends in the Oceania region for January–December 2025, sourced from the 广大大 platform. It can answer retrieval questions regarding market scale, creative format distribution, top-promoted titles, monthly activity cycles, and platform dominance. Key retrievable metrics include 11.8W mobile game advertisers (+40% YoY), 19.6M deduplicated creatives (+76% YoY), and a 74.2% share for video creatives. It lists heavily advertised titles: Bible Word Puzzle, Beast's Creed, Rise of Kingdoms, ACECRAFT, Huntopia, and Street Motor Rider Racing. Monthly trend data tracks active creatives and new creative share from January to December, identifying peak ad placement activity in May and August. The section claims Android leads globally in both advertiser and creative volume, with new creative adoption showing a stable upward trend. Evidence is presented through platform-derived statistics, year-over-year growth rates, percentage breakdowns, and monthly trend visualizations.

     - OS Share (各系统占比): Android dominates globally in advertisers and creatives. Creative volume growth 76%. Peak ad placement in May and August. New creative share shows stable upward trend.
